name: fhir observation export
summary: Adds optional FHIR Observation bundle export for mapped normalized rows and exposes it through the normalize CLI command.
user_visible_flows: operator receives a FHIR bundle file for mapped rows
system_flows: normalized records are transformed into FHIR Observation resources
only mapped rows are emitted into the bundle
the CLI writes the extra FHIR output file when requested
notes: This slice remains backend-only. Verification should focus on FHIR bundle structure, mapped-row filtering, CLI output behavior, and regression against the existing normalization baseline.
